popularStory.headline: My Maternal 19th. Great Scottish Grandfather, Walter Leslie, 7th. Earl of Ross
popularStory.description:
Name: Walter Leslie, 7th. Earl of Ross
Born: about 1323 in Leslie Castle, Aberdeenshire, Scotland
Married: 13 Sept. 1365 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland to Euphemia O'Beolan, Countess of Ross, Abbess o …

She was styled as Lady of Ross.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia Countess of Ross於1348年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾希爾 本 費亞時，她的父親William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye39歲，母親Mary MacDonald30歲。她於大約1363年與Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1394年2月28日享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Euphemia Countess of Ross于1348年出生在苏格兰洛-爾希爾 本 費亞时，她的父亲William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye39岁，母亲Mary MacDonald30岁。她于大约1363年与Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1394年2月28日享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia Countess of Ross was born in 1348, in Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, her father, William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye, was 39 and her mother, Mary MacDonald, was 30. She married Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross about 1363, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 28 February 1394, at the age of 46, and was buried in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia Countess of Ross est née en 1348, à Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mary MacDonald, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross environ 1363, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1394, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Euphemia Countess of Ross 1348 in Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye 39 und ihre Mutter Mary MacDonald 30. Sie hat um 1363 in Scotland Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Februar 1394 im Alter von 46 Jahren und wurde in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia Countess of Ross è nata il nel 1348 nel Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, sua padre, William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mary MacDonald, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross circa 1363, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 febbraio 1394, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Euphemia Countess of Rossが1348年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアヒル オフ フエアルンで生まれた時，父William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skyeは39歳，母Mary MacDonaldは30歳であった。約1363年にスコットランドでLord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1394年2月28日に46歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia Countess of Ross(이)가 1348년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 힐 프 피른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary MacDonald(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1363년 스컷랜드에서 Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 2월 28일 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland: Hill of Fearn, Siorrachd Rois, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia Countess of Ross nasceu em 1348, em Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mary MacDonald, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross aproximadamente 1363, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1394, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia Countess of Ross родилась в 1348 г. в местности хилл оф фирн, росс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary MacDonald, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross около 1363 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 февраля 1394 г. в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Euphemia Countess of Ross nació en 1348, en Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, William - Uilleam de Ross 5th Earl of Ross, Lord of Skye, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mary MacDonald, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross aproximadamente 1363, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1394, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
